content: Phase 1: Implement core backend models (Guest, CheckIn, Submission, Attempt, AuditEvent, AgentState)
Phase 1: Implement TC Kimlik + Passport validators
Phase 1: Implement Mongo-backed queue with leasing/lock
Phase 1: Implement simulated KBS SOAP/XML service
Phase 1: Implement Agent runtime (background worker, heartbeat, retry engine)
Phase 1: Implement state machine + audit trail
Phase 1: Create & run POC test script - fix until stable (52/52 PASSED)
Phase 2: Design Agent call for UI/UX guidelines
Phase 2: Install dependencies + Full App Development (Backend + Frontend)
Phase 2: All user stories covered in Development
Phase 2: End-to-end testing with Testing Agent
